# IP-013: Outer function after closure — sanitized Base stays silent
lang: go
file: IP-013-safe.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func handler(r *http.Request) {
	_ = func() {
		local := "inner"
		_ = local
	}
	path := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
	safe := filepath.Base(path)
	os.Open(safe)
}
